article_title: Trump Restructures Section 232 Tariffs With Five-Tier Metal Import Framework Taking Effect April 6

content_preview.title: Trump Restructures Section 232 Tariffs With Five-Tier Metal Import Framework Taking Effect April 6
content_preview.summary: A presidential proclamation replaces flat-rate Section 232 duties with a five-tier framework imposing up to 50 percent tariffs on steel, aluminum, and copper imports, effective April 6.
content_preview.body_excerpt: President Donald Trump signed a proclamation on April 2 overhauling the Section 232 tariff framework for steel, aluminum, and copper imports, replacing the existing flat-rate regime with a [five-tier duty structure](https://www.whitehouse.gov/fact-sheets/2026/04/fact-sheet-president-donald-j-trump-strengthens-tariffs-on-steel-aluminum-and-copper-imports/) that takes effect on April 6. The restructuring marks the most significant revision to the metals tariff architecture since Section 232 duties...
